race.comment: The Waller-trained SATURDAYS GIRL (8) is a long-term maiden, extending the run to 20 when an eye-catching fourth over 1350m at Doomben last time out. Will go back from a wide gate but has the talent to round up this very plain field. Should be winning. CAIRO QUEEN (1) raced near the tail and struggled to improve when resuming over 1200m at the Sunshine Coast recently. Can make progress over a bit more ground today. DARE TO LOVE (4) ran a nice race two back at Ipswich but failed to finish off over 1350m at Doomben last start. Capable of better in this race with a long tail. PERRIERES (7) wasn't beaten far first-up at Kilcoy, her first run in around a year. Lightly raced mare with plenty of scope for improvement. A long gap to the next best LADY KATE (11) who was just fair first-up at Kilcoy.
